servinfo.title: Clutch Operating Cylinder Assembly Removal and Installation

item.ptxt: Brake fluid is extremely damaging to painted surfaces.
If brake fluid contacts a painted surface, immediately wipe it off and flush the surface thoroughly with water.
The clutch operating cylinder may lose its original performance if it is disassembled and reassembled.
Do not try to disassemble and repair the clutch operating cylinder.

s1.ptxt: Clean around brake master cylinder reservoir cap and remove fluid from brake master cylinder reservoir with syringe or such.
Remove clutch operating cylinder assembly bolts (2), and then remove clutch operating cylinder assembly (3).
Install clutch operating cylinder assembly (1) to transaxle. Tighten clutch operating cylinder assembly bolts (2) to specified torque.
Connect clutch fluid hose (3) to clutch operating cylinder assembly.
Bleed air from clutch system and check clutch pedal free travel.
